name: OpenClaw
project_binding_recipe: Bind the OpenClaw workspace once. HASP may create neutral aliases internally, but day-to-day agent use should prefer named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY.
approval_path: Prefer the wrapper or launcher path, then let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session and use window grants for long OpenClaw execution loops; hasp session grant-plaintext is the operator path when plaintext is explicitly required.
safe_inject_path: Use the stdio tool path for hasp_run and hasp_inject, preferably with named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY instead of recalling secret_01 or revealing plaintext.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env with convenience approval when OpenClaw needs a project-visible env file.
